trail.val: flywheel framing - FCF/sh growth via contract/acquire/recycle
preliminary (incl. Cornerstone, marks to 3/31): ~$34/sh FCF 2027, ~$36 2028 base, ~$41 2028 w/ 70% of FCF to buybacks - a 30% lift vs January (~11% FCF yield)

forward.note: ~$5/MWh further spark-spread appreciation since 3/31 not in the numbers; multiple un-modeled upside levers.

trail.val: Cornerstone ~$500M run-rate EBITDA, >$4/sh incremental FCF; close 'as soon as this summer' pending FERC 203 (HSR cleared March, Indiana order pending)

forward.note: Close triggers the 2026 guidance reset; pre-funded with $4bn notes at ~6.25% ahead of regulatory close.

trail.val: 2026 guidance reaffirmed (adj EBITDA $1.75-2.05bn, adj FCF $0.98-1.18bn) - explicitly excludes pending Cornerstone

forward.note: Base guidance held; upside sits in Cornerstone + spark spreads not yet in the numbers.

trail.val: 'things take time'; redoubled, no rush on new PPAs
35% of gross margin contracted long-term; each incremental 1 GW PPA adds ~15pts, next deal could reach ~50%; delivery wouldn't start before ~2028

forward.note: AWS ~1.9 GW Susquehanna PPA is the anchor; the swing factor is the next 1 GW+ signing toward ~50% contracted.

trail.val: RBP/RVP proposed; 15-yr award unlocks new-build financing
submitted >2 GW to PJM cluster; RVP timing pulled to this fall; pay-as-bid + 15-yr awards the key unlock; new-build doesn't clear merchant ('gap is pretty large')
JPM cites FERC's 2024 rejection of Talen/AWS Susquehanna BTM co-location -> FOTM pivot; power the binding constraint

forward.note: RVP/co-location is the swing factor for new-build financing and the FOTM contracting path.

trail.val: PPL zone peak load projected +70% over five years, AEP +30%
+3% weather-adj YoY; 'value of steel in the ground'

forward.note: PPL-zone leverage (Susquehanna) is the demand backdrop for the contracting/flywheel thesis.
